---
name: '🚀 Feature Request'
about: Suggest a new transcoding format, filter, or dashboard enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear description of the need (e.g., "I need a way to support 4K transcoding").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of the new video processing capability or UI improvement.

**Proposed Implementation (if known)**
Are there specific FFmpeg parameters, plugins, or AWS services (e.g., MediaConvert) that would facilitate this?

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Alternative ways to achieve the same result.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or visual mockups here.
